meaning: adj.醉酒的,吸毒而恍惚的,服过麻醉药的
examples: If Johnny zonked, it would be bad for my book.
It's a zonked nirvana with demons underneath; a fragile state that can't help but break apart on the very next song.
Then it was like the old days, getting Tommy or Jodi ready for bed when they were zonked.
It was a bummer, but Phinney was too zonked to be devastated.
Robin Hoods have come and gone, at least one of them wondrously zestful (Errol Flynn's) and one of them woefully zonked (Kevin Costner's).
